# netbox_location (Data Source)

Fetches a single location from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single location by ID.
data "netbox_location" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "location_name" {
  value = data.netbox_location.example.name
}

output "location_status" {
  value = data.netbox_location.example.status
}

output "location_site_id" {
  value = data.netbox_location.example.site_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the location.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the location.
- `name` (String) Name of the location.
- `parent_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the parent location.
- `site_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the site this location belongs to.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the location.
- `status` (String) The status of the location.
